title: ServerKits
description: The Best Kit Plugin On Modrinth
body:
**📦 KitPlugin — Simple & Powerful Kit Manager for Minecraft Servers**

**Description:**
KitPlugin is a lightweight, easy-to-use Bukkit/Spigot plugin that lets server admins save, load, and give custom player kits directly in-game — no config editing needed. It also includes a clean, interactive **GUI system** for players to browse and preview available kits. Perfect for PvP, survival, or event servers.

**✨ Features:**

* Save your current inventory as a named kit (`/kit save <name>`)
* Instantly load saved kits (`/kit load <name>`)
* Give kits to other players (`/kit give <name> <player>`)
* GUI-based kit selector and preview (`/kit gui`)
* Stores kits safely in a `database.yml` file

**🕹 Commands:**

* `/kit save <kit>` — Save your current inventory as a kit
* `/kit load <kit>` — Load a saved kit
* `/kit give <kit> <player>` — Give a kit to another player
* `/kit gui` — Open the Kit Selection menu

**🔒 Permission:**

* Only server operators (OPs) can use the commands

**✅ Compatibility:**

* Works on **Spigot / Paper**
* No dependencies

Short, clean, and efficient — manage all your kits with ease!
